name: yanweiliang323868-del--docx-md
description: Low-level docx format tool for AI document review. Three operations: (1) read docx → output compact Markdown or JSON; (2) apply edits JSON back to docx (tracked revisions and comments); (3) finalize (accept revisions, remove comments). Markdown output saves tokens vs full JSON. Use when raw .docx read/write is needed. For full contract review workflow, use contract-review-workflow which invokes this tool.
